topics.topic: Architecting Multi-Tenant SaaS: Database-per-Tenant vs. Single-DB Isolation
topics.context: choosing the right scaling strategy for a growing B2B SaaS platform
topics.notes: deep dive into trade-offs, handling cross-tenant migrations, and reporting across isolated databases

topics.topic: Advanced Caching Strategies: Beyond Simply Using Cache::remember
topics.context: managing high-traffic systems where cache stampsede and stale data are critical failures
topics.notes: implementing Atomic Locks for rehydration, Stale-While-Revalidate patterns, and effective use of Cache Tags

topics.topic: Optimizing Laravel Eloquent for High-Frequency Writes
topics.context: reducing DB bottlenecks when your system processes thousands of writes per second
topics.notes: focusing on batching, raw upserts, and avoiding Eloquent event overhead in high-throughput loops

topics.topic: Hardening Laravel APIs with Consumer-Driven Contract Testing
topics.context: ensuring integration stability between Laravel microservices and external providers
topics.notes: using Pact or custom contract tests to catch breaking API changes before they reach production
